# bankruptcyexemptionsbystate.com

> State-by-state guide to bankruptcy exemptions under 11 U.S.C. Section 522. Homestead, vehicle, wildcard, retirement, and personal property exemptions.

bankruptcyexemptionsbystate.com is a free, open-source educational resource about bankruptcy. Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://bankruptcyexemptionsbystate.com/: Bankruptcy Exemptions by State
- https://bankruptcyexemptionsbystate.com/federal-exemptions.html: Federal Bankruptcy Exemptions -- 11 U.S.C. Section 522(d)
- https://bankruptcyexemptionsbystate.com/homestead-exemptions.html: Homestead Exemptions in Bankruptcy -- State-by-State Guide
- https://bankruptcyexemptionsbystate.com/vehicle-exemptions.html: Vehicle Exemptions in Bankruptcy -- How Much Car Equity Is Protected
- https://bankruptcyexemptionsbystate.com/wildcard-exemptions.html: Wildcard Exemptions in Bankruptcy -- Protect Any Property
- https://bankruptcyexemptionsbystate.com/retirement-exemptions.html: Retirement Account Exemptions in Bankruptcy -- 401(k), IRA, Pension
- https://bankruptcyexemptionsbystate.com/personal-property.html: Personal Property Exemptions in Bankruptcy
- https://bankruptcyexemptionsbystate.com/opt-out-states.html: Opt-Out States -- States That Require State Bankruptcy Exemptions
- https://bankruptcyexemptionsbystate.com/faq.html: Bankruptcy Exemptions FAQ

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
